name: Carlos & Susana School Bus
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (district school routes); Broward County area routes; Miami-Dade Public Schools certified field trip vendor
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier (DOT #1795484); affiliated/operates as Air B School Bus Transportation (founded 2000); both entities run Miami-Dade public routes (per company site, ongoing as of 2025-26)
fit_notes: Independent Miami-based operator (~58 buses) with longstanding Miami-Dade contracts and an affiliated Air B brand; meaningful scale for a Florida tuck-in and a real platform footprint in Summit's expansion geography.

name: Shaw School Bus
districts_or_customers: Local Lawrence County / western PA school districts (Volant area); specific district contracts not publicly disclosed
recent_news: Active FMCSA intrastate carrier (DOT #1166831); reported revenue $1M-$5M; no M&A or ownership change reported
fit_notes: Small (~12 bus) family-owned western PA contractor; sub-scale on its own but plausible bolt-on for a Pennsylvania route-density play.

name: School Bus System
districts_or_customers: Possibly affiliated with the Japanese American/Japanese-language community in Little Tokyo (address shares building with Japanese American Cultural & Community Center and Fuji School at 244 S San Pedro St); customer base not confirmed
recent_news: No M&A, ownership, or news coverage found; very low public footprint
fit_notes: Tiny LA operation (~8 employees, $682K rev) in a suite address; appears to be a niche Japanese-community-school transporter, not a typical district contractor; unlikely standalone tuck-in for Summit.

name: Martinez School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Houston-area; specific districts not disclosed; operates as DBA Queens Bus Service per FMCSA
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier and broker (DOT #1947220) since September 2009; 3 power units / 3 drivers; no M&A or news
fit_notes: Very small owner-operator (3 buses) under Higinio Martinez/Queens Bus Service; sub-scale and not a meaningful tuck-in for Summit.

name: Drakeford Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: Possibly West Orange/Essex County area; no NJ DOE contractor code or public district contract identified
recent_news: No M&A, FMCSA, or news coverage tied to this West Orange entity; listed in Yellow Pages as 'Drakeford Transportation Services G & S' / transportation consultants
fit_notes: Tiny (~9 employee) West Orange operation with no confirmable NJ school-bus contractor footprint; status as actual school-bus operator is unverified, low priority for Summit.
